title: Date Flatbread Bites
description: Sweet and savory flatbread bites filled with dates and perfect as a snack or dessert.

ingredients.name: Monsoon
ingredients.amount: 2 tablespoons, chopped fresh herbs (such as parsley or cilantro)

instructions: In a large bowl, combine the torn flatbread, pitted dates, and chopped monsoon herbs.
In a small bowl, mix together the floral honey and 1 tablespoon of water.
Pour the honey mixture over the flatbread mixture and toss until well combined.
Spoon the mixture into a mini muffin tin, pressing the mixture into the corners.
Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until the flatbread is crispy and golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool completely before serving.
